goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加样本采集闸门

summary.title: 增加 dogfood 样本采集闸门
summary.what: 给 Catty dogfood-health 输出新增 sampleGate 机器可读字段，用现有 blockers、sourceQuality 和 samplingFreshness 判断当前应该写 shadow prediction、补 judgement、写受控 Pi sample、等待真实 context switch、只做 candidate dry-run，或不需要继续采样；同时补回归测试和 README 说明。
summary.why: 长期推进 goal 现在 blocked 在 no_user_prior_candidates，且 live context 是 repeated-context/time-gap。只有 recommendedNext 文案时，后续 agent 仍可能误判为可以继续写 Pi 样本或下游 canary；sampleGate 把采样边界独立成结构化读数，降低重复采样和空 canary 建议风险。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty dogfood health 增加样本采集闸门

decisions.chose: 放进 dogfood-health 的 sampleGate 字段，而不是新增独立 CLI。
decisions.rationale: dogfood-health 已经是 v0 readiness 的长期操作入口；把机器可读 gate 放在同一 JSON 输出里，后续 goal agent 每轮定位可以直接消费。

decisions.chose: 只输出 status、reason、command 和 safetyBoundary，不自动执行 shadow、judge、canary 或 memory 写入。
decisions.rationale: v0 仍要求显式手动边界，且当前 live context 已经重复采样，自动写入会污染 dogfood 样本。

decisions.chose: 把相关 proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的顺序诊断增强。
decisions.rationale: 本轮建立在既有 recommendedNext、sourceQuality、samplingFreshness 和 contextBoundaries 之上，只新增结构化派生字段，不改变它们的协议或采样/写入行为。

rejected.alternative: 直接推荐或执行 envchain mom bun src/catty/shadow.ts --pi --write
rejected.reason: 当前 samplingFreshness 是 repeated-context，写入会重复采样同一 live context。

rejected.alternative: 把 no_canary_plans/no_canary_queue 作为下一步推进
rejected.reason: 上游还没有 user-prior candidate；继续下游 canary 会制造空计划或错误写入建议。

review_notes: TDD：先让 dogfood-health.test 红测失败于 result.sampleGate 不存在，再实现 sampleGate。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts，6 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，79 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
runtime live status：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat ok、launchd not running、lastExitCode=0、observe ok、full pipeline throttled 正常。
CLAUDE.md 是既有无关 dirty，未 stage、未提交、未修改。

architectural_claims: dogfood-health remains read-only and side-effect free; sampleGate is derived from existing report/source-quality/blocker/sampling-freshness state.
sampleGate is a machine-readable operator gate and does not replace recommendedNext or perform any write.
The gate preserves the explicit boundary between prediction eval, model-backed samples, user-prior candidates, canary planning, and accepted-memory writing.
behavioral_changes: inspectCattyDogfoodHealth now returns sampleGate in its JSON result.
When predictions are missing, sampleGate.status is needs_shadow_prediction.
When judgements are missing, sampleGate.status is needs_judgement.
When model-backed miss capture is needed and the current context is repeated, sampleGate.status is wait_for_context_switch and points to the shadow dry-run command.
When model-backed miss capture is needed and the context is fresh, sampleGate.status is ready_for_pi_sample and points to the explicit Pi write command.
README documents sampleGate as the machine-readable sampling gate for long-running agents.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts output JSON includes sampleGate

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json were read or emitted.
No model provider calls were added.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, catty_memory_canaries, prediction records, apply receipts, or heartbeat configuration are written by this change.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood-health consumers remain compatible; they receive an additional JSON field.
